text:
A cat liked fish. He watched them go swimming across rivers. Each day they became a different color. Bright yellow. Blue-green. Eventually he imagined catching them. But it seemed impossible. Fish couldn’t hold nets. So he imagined throwing stones instead. Maybe hitting one? Perhaps killing one. But still strange. Maybe?

One day he went fishing. Of course. There were no fishes. Instead he found something bigger. Snails. He had never eaten them. Maybe they tasted interesting? Nothing tastes interesting.

That night he dreamed eating snails. He dreamt.

The next morning? He had.

With feathers. He was beautiful. Eating snails. Everyone loved him. All day everyone fed him snails. He felt happy. Perhaps he didn’t miss eating fish?That night he dreamt.

A castle. Inside? Another cat. Why?Why did anyone think?

The cat liked stories.

So?That cat loved stories. Tales. He would sit anywhere. Anything.

Every
